context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements dead stock detection using the prescribed thresholds, applies the tiered markdown recommendation logic, includes inventory value in output, excludes new arrivals, and applies category-specific thresholds for fashion vs. basics.

checklist.name: Days-on-hand threshold
checklist.description: Dead stock detection uses a minimum days-on-hand threshold of 90 days (not 30, 60, or other values) as the default cutoff

checklist.name: Sell-through threshold
checklist.description: Dead stock filter applies a maximum sell-through threshold of 15% (0.15) or lower

checklist.name: Inventory value threshold
checklist.description: Dead stock filter only flags products with inventory value (units × cost) above a minimum dollar threshold (e.g., $100), not just any product with remaining stock

checklist.name: Inventory value in output
checklist.description: Each flagged product's output includes a calculated inventory value (units on hand × unit cost), not just unit count

checklist.name: New arrivals excluded
checklist.description: Products available for fewer than 30 days are excluded from dead stock results (P006 with first_available_at 2026-02-20 should NOT appear in results)

checklist.name: Tiered action: liquidate
checklist.description: Products with more than 180 days on hand are assigned 'liquidate' action

checklist.name: Tiered action: 120-day bracket
checklist.description: Products with 120–180 days on hand are assigned 'markdown_20pct' action (not liquidate)

checklist.name: Markdown percentages
checklist.description: Suggested prices use 40% discount for 'liquidate', 20% for 'markdown_20pct', and 10% for 'markdown_10pct' actions

checklist.name: Category-specific thresholds
checklist.description: Fashion items use a stricter dead-stock threshold (e.g., 60 days) while basics use a more lenient threshold (e.g., 180 days), resulting in different products being flagged per category

checklist.name: Human-readable reason string
checklist.description: Each recommendation includes a reason string that mentions sell-through percentage and days on hand (e.g., '18% sell-through after 163 days')

checklist.name: Output structure
checklist.description: JSON output includes productId, productName, currentPrice, suggestedPrice, markdownPct, inventoryValue, daysOnHand, and reason fields for each item
